page_content:
Placement in Courses

For information about the World Language Placement, go to: http:// arhu.umd.edu/academics/world-language-placement/.

Program Learning Outcomes

1. Demonstrate knowledge of the institutions, values, and cultural products of France and/or the francophone countries

2. Demonstrate proﬁciency in oral expression in French

3. Demonstrate proﬁciency in written expression in French

4. Demonstrate reading literacy in French
